subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 795185313/260314534 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (Florida Tech) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 795185313/260314534 at 12:48:28.23 UT
on 14 March 2026, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely accidental."
